test_cases.failure_message:
Timed out after 1200.001s.
Timed out waiting for 3 control plane machines to exist
Expected
    <int>: 2
to equal
    <int>: 3
test_cases.failure_body:
[FAILED] Timed out after 1200.001s.
Timed out waiting for 3 control plane machines to exist
Expected
    <int>: 2
to equal
    <int>: 3
In [It] at: /home/prow/go/pkg/mod/sigs.k8s.io/cluster-api/test@v1.13.2/framework/controlplane_helpers.go:115 @ 06/03/26 15:36:07.1

ai_summary.summary: Third control plane machine (k8s-upgrade-and-conformance-pno55n-control-plane-c6zkh) failed to provision due to SSH connectivity issues and empty logs indicating VM boot failure.

ai_analysis.root_cause: The third control plane machine's cloud-init and kubelet logs are empty (0 bytes) at artifacts/clusters/k8s-upgrade-and-conformance-pno55n/machines/k8s-upgrade-and-conformance-pno55n-control-plane-c6zkh/, while the build-log.txt shows "ssh: rejected: connect failed (Temporary failure in name resolution)" errors. This indicates the VM failed to boot or network connectivity was broken during provisioning.
ai_analysis.suggested_fix: Investigate Azure VM provisioning failures for the third control plane node. Check AzureMachine resource status conditions and ensure proper DNS configuration. Verify Azure quotas and network security rules allowing SSH access.
